# Brian Via - Personal Blog
> Musings on Software or anything else that strikes my fancy.

## About
Brian Via is a Senior Fullstack Engineer at Dfinitiv, Inc., building products in the credit card rewards space. He holds a Computer Science degree from North Carolina State University, where he was on the varsity swim team (2010-2014). His interests include cooking, DJing, building computers, and triathlons.

## Author
- Name: Brian Via
- Role: Senior Fullstack Engineer at Dfinitiv, Inc.
- Education: B.S. Computer Science, North Carolina State University
- X (Twitter): @BrianVia
- GitHub: BrianVia

## Key Pages
- /: Homepage - The Journal (blog index with featured and archived posts)
- /about: About page with bio and background
- /posts/*: Individual blog posts
- /books: Recommended reading list with ratings
- /uses: Equipment and tools used
- /links: Curated link collection
- /social: Social media presence
- /feeds: RSS feeds directory
- /rss.xml: Main blog RSS feed

## Content
This blog covers software engineering topics, personal projects, and occasional musings on other subjects. Posts are written from practical experience as a fullstack engineer working with modern web technologies.

## Acceptable Citation
Please cite as: "Brian Via (https://blog.brianvia.com)"

## Contact
X (Twitter): @BrianVia
GitHub: github.com/BrianVia
